Content & keywords

How to use this: Add the missing keywords naturally into your resume — in your skills section, job descriptions, or summary. Don't just list them; use them in context.

Missing — add these

Present — good

Multi-word phrases matter more to ATS than single keywords. A resume that says "project management" scores higher than one that only says "managed projects".

Resume → Job Database

Job Match

Scores every job in your Job Database against the uploaded resume. Shows the top 5 matches with per-job ATS gaps and editing suggestions — ready to email the candidate.

📄

Upload a resume first

Go to Analyze, upload the candidate's resume, then come back here.

🗄️

No jobs found in Job Database

Open the Job Database app and add jobs — they're stored in your browser's localStorage and Match will find them automatically.

How it works

Both apps must be open in the same browser on the same computer. The Job Database saves to localStorage under the key jobdb_jobs — Match reads it directly.

Subject

Opening lines

Email Results to Candidate

Send the full ATS analysis report — score, infractions, missing keywords, and suggested fixes — directly to the candidate's inbox.

What gets sent: Match score · ATS grade · breakdown · all infractions with fixes · missing and present keywords · strengths & gaps. The report is embedded in the email body — no attachment needed.

How Keywords Work

ATS systems scan your resume for keywords from the job description. To identify the right ones, read the JD carefully and highlight repeated terms under Requirements/Qualifications and Responsibilities. Tools, skills, and action verbs that appear more than once are almost always keywords.

Formula: Action Verb + Task (what you did & how) + Outcome
Example: "Analyzed sales data using SQL to identify $200K revenue opportunity"

Accounting & Finance

${['Analyzed','Audited','Balanced','Budgeted','Calculated','Evaluated','Forecasted','Projected','Reconciled','Recommended','Reduced','Strategized'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Sales & Business Development

${['Achieved','Closed','Converted','Delivered','Exceeded','Generated','Increased','Negotiated','Pitched','Promoted','Prospected','Secured','Upsold'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Marketing & Branding

${['Activated','Benchmarked','Coordinated','Designed','Engaged','Executed','Launched','Marketed','Optimized','Published','Rebranded','Scheduled'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Project Management & Planning

${['Accelerated','Administered','Conceptualized','Delegated','Developed','Established','Implemented','Initiated','Launched','Planned','Prioritized','Produced','Simplified'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Operations & Efficiency

${['Automated','Consolidated','Enhanced','Identified','Improved','Leveraged','Monitored','Optimized','Restructured','Standardized','Streamlined'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Technical Skills

${['Analyzed','Built','Coded','Designed','Documented','Engineered','Implemented','Modeled','Programmed','Quantified','Synthesized','Tested','Utilized'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Communication & Customer Service

${['Addressed','Articulated','Collaborated','Communicated','Facilitated','Influenced','Liaised','Negotiated','Persuaded','Presented','Resolved','Responded'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Teamwork & Leadership

${['Coached','Collaborated','Counseled','Delegated','Educated','Facilitated','Guided','Led','Managed','Mentored','Motivated','Supervised','Trained'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Research & Analytical

${['Analyzed','Clarified','Compared','Conducted','Diagnosed','Evaluated','Examined','Extracted','Gathered','Identified','Investigated','Researched'].map(v=>`${v}`).join('')}

Source: BCH "Strive to Thrive" Resume Guide — Ted Rogers School of Management

Import CSV

The parse date and source are extracted from the filename — e.g. Food Service 050726.xlsx → source Food Service, date May 7, 2026.

Supports your scraped format (Page_Job, Page_URL, Page_Company, Page_Location, Page_Salary, Page_Type) as well as generic columns like title, employer, location…

Auto-set expiry: Applied to all imported jobs
